name: Fruit Nad Nut Clusters
recipeInstructions:
1. Line cookie sheets with waxed paper.
2. Melt chips in a medium saucepan over low heat, stirring until smooth.
3. Stir in almonds, dates, and cherries.
4. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto prepared cookie sheets.
5. Garnish each cluster with a Red Candied Cherry piece.
6. Refrigerate until set.
7. Store in an airtight container in a cool place.
Makes 32 candies.
Microwave Directions:
1. Line cookie sheets with waxed paper.
2. In a 4-cup microwave-safe measuring cup, microwave chips on MEDIUM for 3-4 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking.
3. Stir until smooth.
4. Continue as directed above.
Tip: To toast almonds, spread on a cookie sheet and bake at 375°F for 5-10 minutes or until light golden brown. Alternatively, place in a thin layer in a microwave-safe pie pan and microwave on HIGH for 3-4 minutes, stirring frequently until light golden brown.
